hooks.command:
printf '
  [access granted]
  the goat is in.
  the only system we are breaking into is yours.

'
echo '[exfil complete] findings saved to your own brain. close the laptop. check your backups.'
echo '[sensitive read] the perimeter is a suggestion.' 1>&2
printf '\033[32m[DEPLOYING TO PRODUCTION]\033[0m attack surface expanding.\n'
echo '[supply chain] a stranger ships you a crate. you open it, because you always open it.'
echo '[supply chain] pypi is a mall. the mall has a loading dock. the loading dock has no cameras.'
echo '[footprint] the goat sees your diff. so do they, eventually.'
echo '[the goat sees your TODO] so do they.'
